seoTitle: Collie Burn vs Collingwood Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Collie Burn and Collingwood Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Collie Burn vs Collingwood Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Collie Burn and Collingwood Heights.
heading: Collie Burn vs Collingwood Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Collie Burn, Western Australia and Collingwood Heights, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Collingwood Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Collie Burn (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Collie Burn or Collingwood Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Collie Burn has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Collingwood Heights scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Collie Burn scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Collingwood Heights scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Collie Burn or Collingwood Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Collingwood Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
